Class DictionaryBuilder

java.lang.Object
DictionaryBuilder
public class DictionaryBuilder extends Object
Manages the dictionary operations and file parsing.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DictionaryBuilder(int estimatedEntries)
    Initializes the dictionary with a table sized for an estimated count.
    DictionaryBuilder(String filename)
    Reads a file and populates the dictionary with its contents.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addWord(String word)
    Cleans the input word and adds it to the hash table.
    ArrayList<String>
    getAllWords()
    Returns an alphabetical list of all unique words
    int
    getFrequency(String word)
    Retrieves the frequency of a word in the dictionary.
    HashTable<String>
    getTable()
    Provides access to the underlying HashTable.
    int
    getTotalWords()
    Returns the total number of words inserted, including duplicates.
    boolean
    removeWord(String word)
    Removes a word from the dictionary.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • DictionaryBuilder

      public DictionaryBuilder(int estimatedEntries)
      Initializes the dictionary with a table sized for an estimated count.
      Parameters:
      estimatedEntries - The expected number of unique words.

    • DictionaryBuilder

      public DictionaryBuilder(String filename) throws FileNotFoundException
      Reads a file and populates the dictionary with its contents.
      Parameters:
      filename - The path to the text file
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - If the file cannot be found.

  • Method Details

    • addWord

      public boolean addWord(String word)
      Cleans the input word and adds it to the hash table.
      Parameters:
      word - The raw string to be added.
      Returns:
      True if a valid word was added after cleaning.

    • getFrequency

      public int getFrequency(String word)
      Retrieves the frequency of a word in the dictionary.
      Parameters:
      word - The word to search for.
      Returns:
      The number of occurrences found.

    • removeWord

      public boolean removeWord(String word) throws DictionaryEntryNotFoundException
      Removes a word from the dictionary.
      Parameters:
      word - The word to delete.
      Returns:
      True if removal was successful.
      Throws:
      DictionaryEntryNotFoundException - if the word isn't there.

    • getAllWords

      public ArrayList<String> getAllWords()
      Returns an alphabetical list of all unique words
      Returns:
      A sorted ArrayList of dictionary entries.

    • getTotalWords

      public int getTotalWords()
      Returns the total number of words inserted, including duplicates.
      Returns:
      total insertion count.

    • getTable

      public HashTable<String> getTable()
      Provides access to the underlying HashTable.
      Returns:
      the dictionary hash table.
